topic: Full Professionalization Mode Plan for 4444j99 — Two-Lane Professional Presence Strategy
content_preview: 90-day/6-month/12-month professionalization roadmap for GitHub presence. Two-lane strategy: Lane A (razzle & dazzle — widgets, infographics, visual artifacts) and Lane B (professional trust — case studies, repo hygiene, resume pipeline). Three positioning options: Creative Technologist, AI Systems Engineer, DevEx/Governance Lead. Includes widget blueprint, outreach tactics, credential paths, daily/weekly routines.
